app.title: Catalyst Engine
app.subtitle: Influencer marketing, run like a real business.

messaging.closed: This conversation is closed — the assignment is no longer active.

assignment.revision_requested: Revisions were requested on the draft.

discover.title: Discover creators

connection.alreadyConnected: This creator is already on your roster

detail.loadFailed: Couldn't load this profile. Please try again.

section.title: Blacklist
section.none: This creator is not blacklisted by your agency.

status.hard: Hard blacklisted — excluded from your discovery and blocked from connection requests.
status.soft: Soft blacklisted — a warning only; the creator stays matchable.

dialog.title: Blacklist creator
dialog.noRelationHint: Agenție-wide blacklisting requires a connected creator.

type.hard: Hard — exclude from discovery and block requests

dialog.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this creator being blacklisted? (kept private to your agency)

empty.heading: Nu creators yet
empty.body: Creators you invite or engage will appear here across your roster, prospects, and external collaborators.

emptyFiltered.heading: Nu creators match these filters
emptyFiltered.body: Try clearing or changing a filter to see more of your creators.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load your creators. Please try again.

detail.notFound: This creator isn't in your roster.

editor.notesPlaceholder: Private notes about working with this creator (visible to your agency only).

empty.heading: Social metrics will appear once accounts are connected
empty.body: Follower counts and engagement rates aren't available yet — they'll show here when the social integrations land.

empty.heading: Nu availability blocks in this period
empty.body: This creator hasn't marked any unavailable time for the dates shown.

empty.heading: Nu campaign history yet
empty.body: Campanies you run with this creator will appear here.

attach.title: Issue contract
attach.body: Attach contract terms for the creator to review and accept before they can submit a draft.
attach.termsHint: Provide inline terms and/or upload a PDF below.
attach.success: Contract issued. The creator has been notified.
attach.alreadyAttached: A contract is already awaiting this creator's acceptance.
attach.error: We couldn't issue the contract. Please try again.

proceedWithout.requiredError: This campaign requires a per-campaign contract; issue one for the creator to accept.
proceedWithout.error: We couldn't advance this assignment. Please try again.

invite.title: Invitați creators
invite.loadFailed: We couldn't load your roster. Please try again.
invite.attachmentFailed: Atașamentul nu a putut fi încărcat. Vă rugăm să încercați din nou.
invite.noRoster: Nu roster creators to invite yet.

conflict.title: Disponibilitate conflict
conflict.body: {count} selected creator(s) are unavailable during the campaign window. Invitați them anyway?

board.loadError: We couldn't load the board. Please try again.
board.empty: This board has no columns yet.
board.moveFailed: Couldn't move the card — it's back where it was.
board.reorderFailed: Couldn't reorder the columns — the order was restored.

column.name: Column name
column.saveFailed: We couldn't save the column. Please try again.
column.deleteBodyNonEmpty: "{name}" has {count} card(s). Choose where to move them before deleting.
column.errorLastColumn: A board must keep at least one column.
column.errorDestinationRequired: This column has cards — choose a destination column to move them to before deleting.
column.errorGeneric: We couldn't delete the column. Please try again.

automation.subtitle: Each event can move a card to a column automatically. Manual drags never trigger these.
automation.broken: Target column was deleted — pick a new one
automation.updateFailed: We couldn't update the automation. Please try again.

review.feedbackHint: Obligatoriu when requesting changes or rejecting.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

rejectConfirm.title: Respingi această schiță?
rejectConfirm.body: Respingerea este definitivă. Încheie permanent această atribuire — creatorul nu va putea trimite o versiune nouă, iar colaborarea în această campanie se închide. Dacă vrei doar modificări, folosește „Solicită modificări".

resolution.title: Resolve verification
resolution.loadFailed: We couldn't load this assignment. Please try again.
resolution.intro: Automatic verification of this post failed. Acceptați it manually, send it back for a fresh post, or ask the creator to fix the link in place.
resolution.noteHint: Obligatoriu when verifying manually; optional for resubmit requests.
resolution.notActionable: This assignment is no longer awaiting resolution.

toast.resubmitFresh: Sent back for a fresh post.
toast.resubmitInPlace: Asked the creator to fix the link.
toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

viewPost.empty: The creator hasn't posted any content yet.
viewPost.simulated: Verificare runs against a simulated provider in this environment.

addCreators.addFailed: Failed to add creators to the pool.

empty.heading: Nu team members
empty.body: Invitați your first team member to get started.

agencyUsers.emptyFiltered: Nu team members match your filter.

bulkInvite.title: Bulk-invite creators
bulkInvite.description: Încărcați a CSV with an `email` column. Each row becomes a magic-link invitation. Other columns are accepted but ignored.

file.label: CSV file
file.hint: 5 MB / 1000 rows max. The only required column is `email`.

bulkInvite.softWarning: {count} rows is a large batch — processing may take a few minutes.

timeout.heading: Still working on this
timeout.description: Your invitations are taking longer than expected to process. You can try again or check back later.

errors.submitFailed: We couldn't submit the CSV. Please try again.

accept.title: You've been invited
accept.joining: You're being invited to join {agencyName} as {role}.
accept.success: Bun venit to {agencyName}! You're now a {role}.

expired.heading: This invitation has expired
expired.body: Please contact your agency administrator to request a new invitation.

alreadyAccepted.heading: Invitație already accepted
alreadyAccepted.body: This invitation has already been used. Conectați-vă to access your workspace.

alreadyMember.heading: Already a member
alreadyMember.body: You are already a member of this workspace.

emailMismatch.heading: Wrong account
emailMismatch.body: This invitation was sent to a different email address. Please sign in with the correct account.

notFound.heading: Invitație not found
notFound.body: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used.

settings.title: Agenție settings

fields.blacklistNotificationPolicyHint: When on, a creator is emailed if your agency blacklists them. The reason is never shared.

settings.readOnly: Only administrators can edit agency settings.
